rationale.R1.5: The revised text presents a clear and coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the original issues of internal inconsistencies and unjustified design choices.
rationale.RX.1: The uncertainty disclosure is explicit, with specific numbers (Spearman ρ = 0.94) and leave-one-out robustness check to address potential concerns about method-family idiosyncrasy.
rationale.RX.3: The revised text recognizes the active set exactly as requested, covering the agreed-upon dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The downstream-harm avoidance is evident, with a clear explanation of how PolySolve flags intervals and warns downstream consumers about potential numerical sensitivity.
rationale.RX.5: The provenance and traceability are excellent, with explicit citations to prior work (probabilistic numerics by Hennig/Osborne) and a clear description of the panel composition and verification statistic.
